name: Karen's Dip
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Jar of Green olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Blend well until fully incorporated.
3. Chill the mixture for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. To serve as a dip, simply scoop with crackers or bread.
5. Alternatively, form the chilled mixture into balls and refrigerate until ready to serve.
